overview.label: NOT JUST ANOTHER TEXT EDITOR
overview.description: Most editors treat lyrics as plain text. We built this one to work with the audio itself — waveform visualization, region-based editing, and tap-to-sync that lets you feel the rhythm instead of guessing.

waveform.label: WAVEFORM EDITING
waveform.title: Drag. Resize. Done.
waveform.description: See every syllable on the timeline. Drag regions to align with the music. Resize with precision using intuitive handles.

transcription.label: AUTO TRANSCRIPTION
transcription.title: Paste a link. Get lyrics back.
transcription.description: Drop a YouTube URL and let our transcription service extract the audio and generate timed lyrics for you to fine-tune.

tap.label: TAP SYNC
tap.title: Sync with your ears, not your eyes.
tap.description: Play the track and tap any key to mark each line. The rhythm stays in your fingers, not in tedious timestamp hunting.

export.label: EXPORT
export.title: One click to .lrc
export.description: Download industry-standard LRC files. Compatible with all major lyric players, karaoke apps, and subtitle editors.

steps.title: Paste URL
steps.description: Drop a YouTube link or upload audio file

steps.title: Audio Ready
steps.description: We extract the audio and generate waveform

steps.title: Sync Lines
steps.description: Edit timestamps or tap to sync manually

finalCta.title: Ready to sync?
finalCta.description: No account needed. No install. Just paste & go.
